film.title: Om Shanti Om
film.overview: Reincarnated 30 years after being killed in a suspicious on-set fire, a small-time actor is determined to punish the person who ignited the blaze.

dialogues.dialogue: Mukesh! Because of you this beautiful set is going to be destroyed! I am sorry! - What a shame. And I've already arranged for it to burn down! But this set will not burn alone!

Mr. Ramesh, what would you know about the worth of this vermillion? It's a gift from God. This crimson dot! Pushpa It's a crown of pride. For an indian bride! It's every woman's dream. It's ruby sheen! Oh Pushpa.
dialogues.cause_raw: wearing vermillion as an Indian bride
